List Available Indicator Themes

Source: R/metadata.R
get_themes.Rd

Returns the unique theme/domain values present in the local indicators dataset. Pass one of these values to the theme argument of search_indicators() or view_indicators() to narrow results.

Usage

get_themes()

Value

A sorted character vector of theme names.

Examples

get_themes()
#> [1] "API Discovered"
